title: Offline Mock: Anwar Sales Contract Approved
body: The structural parameters and delivery logistics for the Dhaka division infrastructure pipeline have been completely verified and signed off by the engineering board.

title: Offline Mock: Material Supply Chain Update
body: Shipments for high-grade reinforcement bars are currently processing ahead of schedule. Expected arrival at the central depot within forty-eight hours.

title: Offline Mock: Regional Review Meeting Scheduled
body: All regional supervisors from Dhaka, Chittagong, and Sylhet sectors are requested to submit their gross validation metrics ahead of Friday's operations briefing.
